protocol.purpose: Convert pipeline evidence into formalized paper products rather than log dumps.
protocol.body_rule: Paper bodies summarize evidence as claims, methods, results, boundaries, and obligations. Raw logs, file paths, and database/archive inventories remain in appendices or supporting ledgers.
protocol.claim_rule: Only ASSEMBLE records may support publication claims in the results section. Discovery records may appear only as obligations, comparators needed, or source-card queues.
protocol.database_rule: CAM databases can support methods, provenance, memory, receipts, and source routing immediately, but row-level scientific claims require exact table/row cards and external publication pairing.
protocol.archive_rule: Archives can support discovery and source provenance immediately. Extracted files must become exact source cards before formal claims are promoted.
protocol.publication_products: One formalized product is generated per 00-79 slot, with multi-slot evidence summarized by role.
